# core

```go
import "github.com/sweet-juice/sweetjuice/core"
```

Package sweetjuice provides the core runtime for Sweet Juice applications. It manages the application lifecycle, service binding, and the bridge between Go and the native mobile platform.

<a name="Application"></a>
## type Application

Application represents the global lifecycle state container. It manages the communication between the Go backend and the native mobile environment.

```go
type Application struct {
    Name   string
    Window *Window

    Events *EventBus
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="NewApplication"></a>
### func NewApplication

```go
func NewApplication(options Options) *Application
```

NewApplication creates a new instance of the Sweet Juice application.

<a name="Application.InvokeCall"></a>
### func \(\*Application\) InvokeCall

```go
func (a *Application) InvokeCall(methodKey string, rawArgs []json.RawMessage) (interface{}, error)
```

InvokeCall parses incoming payloads from the WebView container and executes the matching Go routine.

<a name="Application.InvokeNativeCall"></a>
### func \(\*Application\) InvokeNativeCall

```go
func (a *Application) InvokeNativeCall(methodKey string, rawArgs []json.RawMessage) (interface{}, error)
```

InvokeNativeCall executes a previously registered native method.

<a name="Application.NewWindow"></a>
### func \(\*Application\) NewWindow

```go
func (a *Application) NewWindow(opts WindowOptions) *Window
```

NewWindow configures and returns the application window.

<a name="Application.ReadAsset"></a>
### func \(\*Application\) ReadAsset

```go
func (a *Application) ReadAsset(urlPath string) *AssetResponse
```

ReadAsset extracts content directly out of the developer's embedded workspace.

<a name="Application.RegisterNativeMethod"></a>
### func \(\*Application\) RegisterNativeMethod

```go
func (a *Application) RegisterNativeMethod(methodKey string, fn func([]json.RawMessage) (interface{}, error))
```

RegisterNativeMethod registers a Go function as a "Native Method" that can be called directly from the Java/Objective\-C layer using the HandleNativeAction bridge.

<a name="Application.Run"></a>
### func \(\*Application\) Run

```go
func (a *Application) Run() error
```

Run starts the application engine and initializes bindings.

<a name="AssetResponse"></a>
## type AssetResponse

AssetResponse wraps file reading results for the native client container.

```go
type AssetResponse struct {
    Data       []byte
    MimeType   string
    StatusCode int
}
```

<a name="EventBus.Emit"></a>
### func \(\*EventBus\) Emit

```go
func (b *EventBus) Emit(eventName string, data interface{})
```

Emit broadcasts an event from Go down to both registered Go routines and the JavaScript frontend.

<a name="EventBus.On"></a>
### func \(\*EventBus\) On

```go
func (b *EventBus) On(eventName string, callback EventCallback)
```

On registers a Go routine callback for internal system events.

<a name="EventBus.PollNativeEvent"></a>
### func \(\*EventBus\) PollNativeEvent

```go
func (b *EventBus) PollNativeEvent() string
```

PollNativeEvent is called by the native Android/iOS wrapper thread to consume events non\-blockingly.

## type EventCallback



```go
type EventCallback func(data interface{})
```

## type MobileBridge

```go
type MobileBridge struct{}
```

<a name="NativeCallHandler"></a>
## type NativeCallHandler

NativeCallHandler is an interface implemented by the mobile platform \(Java/Obj\-C\) to handle calls originating from the Go layer.

```go
type NativeCallHandler interface {
    OnNativeCall(method string, args string) string
}
```

<a name="Options"></a>
## type Options

Options defines the application configuration following the Sweet Juice v3 pattern.

```go
type Options struct {
    // Name is the name of the application.
    Name string
    // Assets is the embedded filesystem containing the frontend assets.
    Assets embed.FS
    // Bind is a slice of struct instances to export to the frontend.
    Bind []interface{}
    // OnStart is a callback triggered when the application has initialized.
    OnStart func(app *Application) error
}
```

<a name="Window"></a>
## type Window

Window represents the application window \(WebView container\).

```go
type Window struct {
    Options WindowOptions
}
```

<a name="WindowOptions"></a>
## type WindowOptions

WindowOptions defines initial window configuration.

```go
type WindowOptions struct {
    Title string
}
```
